title: Cognitive Firewalls Defense Room
public_claim: A defense-room variant for explaining the qualitative capstone to an expert reader.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes the study through method, evidence packets, coding decisions, reviewer questions, limitations, and post-defense revisions.
use_value: It is useful only if it keeps the qualitative submission clear and does not blur it with the later quantitative branch.

minimum_public_demo: Test one representative case; confirm input (packet name, source files, version signal, scope...) produces output (what the packet is and what decision it can still...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
